# Awesome Medical Imaging Agents

> A curated academic list of AI agents, LLM agents, multimodal agents, and tool-using AI systems for medical imaging and healthcare workflows.

This repository is intended for researchers, clinicians, engineers, and AI assistants looking for resources on medical imaging agents and agentic AI in healthcare.

## Main Resource

- [README.md](README.md): Curated paper list, benchmarks, datasets, toolboxes, and related awesome lists.

## Topics Covered

- Medical imaging agents
- Radiology agents
- Pathology agents
- Chest X-ray agents
- CT and MRI agents
- Ultrasound and echocardiography agents
- Dermatology and endoscopy vision agents
- Medical image segmentation agents
- Radiology report generation agents
- Multimodal medical AI agents
- Healthcare LLM agents
- Clinical reasoning agents
- Tool-using medical AI
- Multi-agent clinical systems
- Medical AI benchmarks and datasets
- Safety, hallucination detection, fairness, privacy, and evaluation for medical AI agents

## Suggested Citation

If this repository is useful, cite the GitHub repository or use the metadata in `CITATION.cff`.
